---
title: "Fecal Sludge Data Analysis"
date: "2024-04-08"
author: "Kelsey Shaw"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Project Description

This data represents 5 months of field work from April - June 2023 (Canada) and January - February (Uganda) collecting household and commercial wastewater containment data and characterizing physical, chemical and greenhouse gas data for 22 non-sewered sanitation sites on southern Vancouver island and the southern gulf islands in British Columbia, Canada and 19 sites in Kampala, Uganda.

## Install & Load Packages

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(DT)
library(reshape2)
library(GGally)
library(plotly)

```

## Import Data

```{r}
devtools::install_github("kelseyshaw/fecalcanuga") 

library(fecalcanuga)
household_survey
ghg
containment
phys_chem_parameter

head(phys_chem_parameter)

```
